---
description: "Creates a feature specification from a natural-language description, emitting up to three clarification markers. Use when starting a new feature or user story. Do NOT use for planning the technical approach (use plan) or breaking work into tasks (use tasks)."
---
# /specify

Write `spec.md` for a feature from a natural-language description.

## Steps
1. Extract actors, actions, data, and constraints from the description.
2. Write prioritized, independently-testable user stories.
3. Write testable functional requirements and measurable success criteria.
4. Emit at most three `[NEEDS CLARIFICATION]` markers for genuinely ambiguous, high-impact decisions.

This is a user-invoked command (off the always-loaded model listing).
